title: सीता हृदयम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री सीता हृदयम् ॥

॥ ध्यानम् ॥
ध्यायामि जानकीं सीतां रामवामाङ्कसंस्थिताम्।
पद्मपत्रायताक्षीं तां सर्वलक्षणसंयुताम्॥

॥ हृदयम् ॥
सीते वैदेहि वामोरु रामपत्नि नमोऽस्तु ते।
जनकात्मजे विश्वजननि मैथिलि परमेश्वरि॥ १॥

त्वमेव श्रीर्महालक्ष्मीः त्वमेव विजयप्रदा।
त्वमेव धर्मपत्नी च त्वमेव भुवनेश्वरी॥ २॥

अशोकवनवासा त्वं त्रिजटाप्रियदर्शना।
हनूमत्सन्देशहर्षा रामनामजपप्रिया॥ ३॥

भूमिजा भूमिकन्या च सीतावनमहोत्सवा।
अयोध्याराज्ञी विदेहा मिथिलापुरवासिनी॥ ४॥

लवकुशजननी देवी पातिव्रत्यव्रताधिका।
अग्निपरीक्षासंशुद्धा सत्यशीला पतिव्रता॥ ५॥

शीलसौभाग्यसम्पन्ना सर्वसौन्दर्यसुन्दरी।
रामहृदयनिवासा रामप्राणप्रिया सदा॥ ६॥

सीताहृदयमाख्यानं यः पठेद्भक्तिसंयुतः।
पातिव्रत्यफलं तस्य सौभाग्यं च प्रजायते॥ ७॥

रामसीतासमेतस्य ध्यानात्पापं प्रणश्यति।
धर्मार्थकाममोक्षांश्च लभते नात्र संशयः॥ ८॥

॥ इति श्री सीता हृदयं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Sita Hridayam ||

|| Dhyanam ||
Dhyaayami Janakim Sitam Rama-vamanka-samsthitam.
Padma-patrayatakshim Tam Sarva-lakshana-samyutam.

|| Hridayam ||
Site Vaidehi Vamoru Ramapatni Namostu Te.
Janaka-atmaje Vishwajanani Maithili Parameshwari. || 1 ||

Tvameva Shrir-Mahalakshmih Tvameva Vijayaprada.
Tvameva Dharmapatni Cha Tvameva Bhuvaneshwari. || 2 ||

Ashoka-vana-vasa Tvam Trijata-priya-darshana.
Hanumat-sandesha-harsha Rama-nama-japa-priya. || 3 ||

Bhumija Bhumikanya Cha Sitavana-mahotsava.
Ayodhya-rajni Videha Mithila-pura-vasini. || 4 ||

Lava-kusha-janani Devi Pativratya-vratadhika.
Agni-pariksha-samshudha Satya-shila Pativrata. || 5 ||

Shila-saubhagya-sampanna Sarva-saundarya-sundari.
Rama-hridaya-nivasa Rama-prana-priya Sada. || 6 ||

Sita-hridayam-aakhyanam Yah Pathed Bhakti-samyutah.
Pativratya-phalam Tasya Saubhagyam Cha Prajayate. || 7 ||

Rama-Sita-sametasya Dhyanat Papam Pranashyati.
Dharmartha-kama-mokshamsh-cha Labhate Natra Samshayah. || 8 ||

|| Iti Shri Sita Hridayam Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning: सीता हृदयम् में माता सीता (जानकी, वैदेही, मैथिली) के दिव्य स्वरूप और गुणों का वर्णन है। सीता जी श्री, महालक्ष्मी, विजयप्रदा, धर्मपत्नी और भुवनेश्वरी हैं। अशोकवन में रहकर भी रामनाम जपती रहीं, अग्निपरीक्षा से शुद्ध सिद्ध हुईं, पातिव्रत्य की सर्वोच्च आदर्श हैं। जो भक्तिपूर्वक इस स्तोत्र का पाठ करता है उसे सौभाग्य और पातिव्रत्य फल प्राप्त होता है तथा धर्म, अर्थ, काम, मोक्ष — चतुर्विध पुरुषार्थ की प्राप्ति होती है।
benefits: Grants the four purusharthas - dharma, artha, kama, moksha
Destroys all sins through meditation on Rama-Sita
Especially beneficial for married women and families
Brings divine grace of Mother Sita into the household
description: Dedicated to Goddess Sita, the Sita Hridayam (सीता हृदयम्) is a heart-essence prayer revered in Hindu tradition. Drawn from Ananda Ramayana, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Devotees recite this prayer to bring divine grace of Mother Sita into the household and destroy all sins through meditation on Rama-Sita. It is also said to bestow pativratya (marital devotion) and saubhagya. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Friday (Shukravar) and during Vivah Panchami and Ram Navami. The text contains 8 verses and takes around 8 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Sita Hridayam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Sita Hridayam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning and transliteration. Sacred hymn to Goddess Sita for marital bliss and divine blessings.
